privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a dynamically created synthetic provider ('Sarah Chen') initialized via setup_task.sh. The required schedule parameters (target date '2026-03-20', start time '08:00', end time '12:00') and note keywords ('hospital', 'board', 'meeting') are arbitrary constraints imposed by the task instructions and validated by verifier.py. The environment is entirely synthetic and does not rely on real-world patient or provider datasets.
